content: Our company, CloudTech Solutions, specializes in providing cloud migration, AI consulting, and specialized software development services. We were founded in 2020 and have a team of over 50 experts.
Project Mistral is an internal initiative to integrate advanced LLMs like Mistral 7B and Mixtral into our customer support workflows to automate email responses and ticket categorization.
We offer monthly subscription plans starting at $499 for basic cloud monitoring and reaching $4999 for full-scale enterprise AI integration.
For sales inquiries, contact sales@cloudtech.example.com. For technical support, use support@cloudtech.example.com.
